note: Centre Pompidou's 'Constellation' program. The Paris building closed for renovation in Sept 2025, so 2026 shows are off-site. Hand-maintained capture fixture. Future-opening only; currently-running shows (La Bataille des couleurs at Maison Pompidou; the Pompidou-Metz shows) omitted, as are minor regional touring stops (Auxerre, Deauville, Toulon).

items.title: Vies minuscules
items.description: Pompidou-collection show on marginal, intimate, or forgotten lives in art (~30 artists), at the Panthéon during the building's renovation
